summary: Completed comprehensive testing of expanded admin UI config fields (27+ fields). All backend API tests pass (18/18). Frontend pages (Landing, Menu, Review Order) render correctly without crashes. All new config fields are returned by API and correctly used by frontend.

backend_api: Config has all 11 landing page visibility fields (showLogo, showWelcomeText, showDescription, showSocialIcons, showTableNumber, showPromotions, showPoweredBy, showCallWaiter, showPayBill, showAboutUs, showFooter) - all true
Config has 2 menu page visibility fields (showPromotionsOnMenu, showCategories) - all true
Config has 7 order page visibility fields (showCustomerDetails, showCustomerName, showCustomerPhone, showCookingInstructions, showSpecialInstructions, showPriceBreakdown, showTableInfo) - all true
Config has 5 branding fields (logoUrl, primaryColor, welcomeMessage, tagline, instagramUrl)
Config has 3 banners with correct structure
Default config has all 27+ fields with correct defaults
Default config has all 20 visibility toggles defaulting to true
PUT /api/config/ endpoint exists and requires auth
frontend_landing_page: Landing page loads without errors at /478
Welcome message shows 'Welcome to 18March!' from config
Tagline shows 'Crafted with passion, served with love' from config
Config banner carousel visible with 3 banners
Browse Menu button visible with config primary color #F26B33
frontend_menu_page: Menu page loads at /478/menu without errors
About Us visible in hamburger menu (showAboutUs=true)
32 ADD buttons rendered for menu items
Item can be added to cart successfully
View Cart button appears after adding item
frontend_review_order_page: Review Order page loads at /478/review-order without errors
Price Breakdown visible with Subtotal, VAT, Total (showPriceBreakdown=true)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All UI tests passed - landing, menu, review order pages)

seed_data_creation: Config for restaurant 478 already seeded with all 27+ fields including: 11 landing page toggles, 2 menu page toggles, 7 order page toggles, 5 branding fields, 3 banners
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 27+ admin config fields are working correctly. Restaurant 478 has custom config with all visibility toggles set to true. Restaurant 999 returns defaults with all toggles true. The config fields control visibility of UI elements across landing page (logo, welcome, description, social icons, table number, promotions, powered by, call waiter, pay bill, about us, footer), menu page (promotions, categories, footer), and review order page (customer details, customer name, customer phone, cooking instructions, special instructions, price breakdown, table info). OTP verification accepts '1111' for testing.
